description: Create visualization of Epe1 domain architecture and catalytic triad comparison
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

# Create a comprehensive figure showing Epe1 domain architecture and catalytic residue comparison

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 1, figsize=(14, 10), gridspec_kw={'height_ratios': [1.5, 2]})

# Panel A: Epe1 domain architecture
ax1 = axes[0]
ax1.set_xlim(0, 960)
ax1.set_ylim(-1, 3)
ax1.set_title('A. Epe1/Jhd1 Domain Architecture (S. pombe, 948 aa)', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')

# Full protein bar
ax1.barh(1.5, 948, height=0.6, left=1, color='lightgray', edgecolor='black', linewidth=1.5)

# JmjC domain
ax1.barh(1.5, 402-243, height=0.6, left=243, color='#4ECDC4', edgecolor='black', linewidth=1.5, label='JmjC domain')
ax1.text(322, 1.5, 'JmjC\n(243-402)', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')

# N-terminal activation domain (from Sorida 2019)
ax1.barh(1.5, 150, height=0.6, left=1, color='#FFD93D', edgecolor='black', linewidth=1.5, label='N-terminal region (cleaved under stress)')
ax1.text(75, 1.5, 'N-term\n(1-150)', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=9)

# C-terminal region with Swi6 interaction
ax1.barh(1.5, 948-403, height=0.6, left=403, color='#FF6B6B', edgecolor='black', linewidth=1.5, alpha=0.5, label='C-terminal (Swi6 interaction, 403-948)')
ax1.text(675, 1.5, 'C-terminal region\n(Swi6/HP1 interaction)', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=9)

# Mark key residues
residues = [
    (294, 'T294\n(α-KG)', 'blue'),
    (297, 'H297\n(Fe²⁺)', 'red'),
    (299, 'E299\n(Fe²⁺)', 'red'),
    (307, 'Y307\n(mutagenesis:\nLOF)', 'purple'),
    (314, 'K314\n(α-KG)', 'blue'),
]
for pos, label, color in residues:
    ax1.plot(pos, 0.8, 'v', markersize=10, color=color)
    ax1.annotate(label, xy=(pos, 0.75), xytext=(pos, 0.0), fontsize=7, ha='center', va='top',
                arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='-', color=color, lw=0.5))

ax1.set_xlabel('Amino acid position', fontsize=11)
ax1.set_yticks([])
ax1.legend(loc='upper right', fontsize=8, framealpha=0.9)

# Panel B: Facial triad comparison table
ax2 = axes[1]
ax2.set_xlim(0, 10)
ax2.set_ylim(0, 8)
ax2.set_title('B. Fe(II) Facial Triad and α-KG Binding Residue Comparison', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')
ax2.axis('off')

# Table data
headers = ['Protein', 'Organism', 'Triad H₁', 'Triad D/E', 'Triad H₃', 'α-KG (T)', 'α-KG (K)', 'Catalytic?']
rows = [
    ['KDM2A', 'Human', 'H212 ✓', 'D214 ✓', 'H284 ✓', 'T209 ✓', 'K229 ✓', 'YES (H3K36)'],
    ['KDM3A', 'Human', 'H1120 ✓', 'D1122 ✓', 'H1249 ✓', '—', '—', 'YES (H3K9)'],
    ['FIH', 'Human', 'H199 ✓', 'D201 ✓', 'H279 ✓', 'T196 ✓', 'K214 ✓', 'YES (hydroxylase)'],
    ['ScJhd1', 'S. cerevisiae', 'H305 ✓', 'D307 ✓', 'H377 ✓', 'T302 ✓', 'K322 ✓', 'YES (H3K36)'],
    ['Epe1/Jhd1', 'S. pombe', 'H297 ✓', 'E299 ✓', 'ABSENT ✗', 'T294 ✓', 'K314 ✓', 'NO (in vitro)'],
]

table = ax2.table(cellText=rows, colLabels=headers, loc='center', cellLoc='center')
table.auto_set_font_size(False)
table.set_fontsize(9)
table.scale(1.2, 1.8)

# Color the cells
for j in range(len(headers)):
    table[0, j].set_facecolor('#2C3E50')
    table[0, j].set_text_props(color='white', fontweight='bold')

# Color Epe1 row differently
epe1_row = len(rows)  # Last row
for j in range(len(headers)):
    table[epe1_row, j].set_facecolor('#FFE6E6')

# Color the ABSENT cell red
table[epe1_row, 4].set_facecolor('#FF6B6B')
table[epe1_row, 4].set_text_props(fontweight='bold', color='white')

# Color the "NO" cell
table[epe1_row, 7].set_facecolor('#FF6B6B')
table[epe1_row, 7].set_text_props(fontweight='bold', color='white')

# Color YES cells green
for i in range(1, epe1_row):
    table[i, 7].set_facecolor('#90EE90')

# Add note
ax2.text(5, 0.3, 
         'The third His (H₃) of the Fe(II) facial triad is ABSENT in S. pombe Epe1.\n'
         'All catalytically verified JmjC enzymes (demethylases and hydroxylases) retain all three triad residues.\n'
         'PomBase annotates Epe1 with NOT|enables histone H3 demethylase activity (IDA, PMID:16362057).',
         ha='center', va='center', fontsize=10, style='italic',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='lightyellow', edgecolor='orange'))

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('epe1_domain_and_triad.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved: epe1_domain_and_triad.png")
